assertions.description: wspr_tx_v1.sch contains three separate 3-pole LC low-pass filter chains (9 inductors + 12 capacitors labeled L1-L9 and C4-C15), used for harmonic filtering of WSPR RF output. The signal_analysis.lc_filters array is empty despite the clear LC ladder topology. Similarly, rf_chains is empty even though SMA connectors J2/J3/J4 provide the RF output interface. The crystal oscillator circuit (Y1 + load caps) was also not detected. This is a significant missed detection for an RF design.
